groupDefinition.name: Setup View
groupDefinition.description: Initial configuration interface for connection parameters and environment initialization.

items.title: Extend `GdbConfigService` Configuration Model
items.description: Extend the config object into a complete DAP connection configuration interface
details: Rename service to `DapConfigService` (aligning with the generic DAP concept in the spec)
[Test] Verify `setConfig()` and `getConfig()` correctly store and return complete `DapConfig` data

items.title: Setup Form Field Completion
items.description: Complete all Setup form fields per spec [§3.1](system-specification.md#31-initialization-setup-view-setup)
details: Add **Launch Mode** selector (`mat-button-toggle` or `mat-radio`: Launch / Attach)
Button text dynamically switches based on Launch Mode ("Launch" / "Attach")

items.title: Setup Form Validation
items.description: Implement real-time form validation per spec [§7.3](system-specification.md#73-user-configuration-validation)
details: Required field validation + inline error messages
Launch/Attach button disabled when validation fails
